name: Deadsigns
developer: Jean-Baptiste Leonelli, Cyril Trigaux, Simon-Pierre Mattei, Erik Kubiak
publisher: Jean-Baptiste Leonelli, Cyril Trigaux, Simon-Pierre Mattei, Erik Kubiak
short_description: DeadSigns is a first person action game with survival and tower defense features. Go through many nights and beat a lot of monsters with style and get the best score !
detailed_description:
DeadSigns is a first-person action game with survival and tower defense mechanics.

Survive as long as possible and defend yourself against endless waves of mutant plants and monstrous creatures. During the day, prepare for the night by gathering materials and crafting defenses. When night falls, fight until the day returns.

This game is no longer in development.
